name: Peppermint Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup crushed peppermint candies (I used leftover candy canes from last Christmas)
2 1.65-ounce chocolate candy bars, finely chopped (I used dark chocolate, but milk chocolate would be good, too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix crumbs and butter; press into bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes. Cool.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water. Stir over medium heat until dissolved.
4. Beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended. Gradually add gelatin, whipped cream, and peppermint candy mixture. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
5. Fold in remaining whipping cream. Pour over crust. Refrigerate until firm.
6. Garnish with more whipped cream and crushed peppermint candy.
